title: Ratpack
description: A rat modpack, for rat people. With a strict vanilla-friendly design optimized for server use.
body: This modpack enhances the Minecraft experience by carefully fine-tuning its included mods. It introduces seamless features and expanded content that feel like they belong in the game. The goal of this project is to include only elements that fit naturally into the Minecraft world, ensuring a cohesive and balanced gameplay experience. The result is a harmonious and complete modpack that feels like a true extension of the original game, with full server accessibility.
